meaning: I owe you 借条,借据
examples: We shouldn't issue IOU to farmers.
When someone borrows money from me, I usually ask for an IOU.
The other half will have their claims settled by a mix of cash and a tradable IOU.
An exchange-traded note is an unsecured bank IOU with returns pegged to some index.
The bank takes that contract , creates an account and deposits that IOU into an account.
